free_text: Absolute neutron absorption cross sections for Sb-Be
The detectors were modified long counters
surrounded by a 5 cm thick cylinder of lead and
shielded from the source by an 8 cm thickness of lead.
First group: (a) statistical uncertainties in shell-
on and shell-off counts, (b) uncertainties arising
from electronic drifts or other external sources, (c)
uncertainty due to scattering of neutrons by the
surroundings, and (d) uncertainty in the effect of
the 380 keV neutron group including the uncertainty
in efficiency. Second group: (a) uncertainty in shell
dimensions, (b) uncertainty in number of atoms per cm
3 of sample material. (c) uncertainty in the Pescape,
(i = 1, 2, m), (d) uncertainty in total cross section,
(e) uncertainty in the analysis arising from
approximations, and (f) uncertainty in the resonance
have been pessimistically evaluated and r.m.s, combined
BP: Updated to new date formats, lower
case. Corrections according last EXFOR rules and
Dict. Updated entry, added uncertainties details.
